reasoning_chain_text: 1. Filter the clinical table to non-excluded serous cases.
2. Pull log-scale mutation-burden values for those cases from the mutation-burden sheet.
3. Convert each log-scale mutation-burden value to the linear variants-per-megabase scale.
4. Compute the median linear variants-per-megabase value and round to four decimals.
original_final_question: What is the median number of variants per Mbp for the serous tumor samples in the study? Round the result to 4 decimal places. Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Filter the clinical table to non-excluded cases with Serous histologic type.
Node 2 depends on node 1: Pull Log2_variant_per_Mbp values for those serous cases from the B-APM subtypes mutation-burden sheet.
Node 3 depends on node 2: Convert each log2 mutation-burden value to the linear variants-per-Mbp scale.
Node 4 depends on node 3: Compute the median linear variants-per-Mbp value and round it to four decimal places.

ideal_code.intent: Which non-excluded cases in the clinical table have Serous histologic type?
